name: KHALILUR RAHMAN RIDOY KHAN
summary: Data analyst with 1 year of dedicated experience and 4+ years in software engineering, specializing in Python, R, and SQL analysis, dashboarding, and ETL. Experienced in community data collection and geospatial reporting for public health programs.

experience.title: IT Team Leader
highlights: Conduct advanced data analysis using Python, R, and BI tools to support decision-making.
Build dashboards and automated reports for business and operational teams.
Design and optimize data pipelines and ETL workflows.
Improve data quality through validation rules, monitoring, and standardized metrics.
Partner with stakeholders to define KPIs and translate needs into analyses.

experience.title: Team Lead - Community Data Collection Platform
highlights: Led development of a community data collection and village mapping platform.
Designed field data workflows for surveys, validation, and standardization.
Implemented geospatial data structures to support micro-planning.
Coordinated field teams and data reviewers to ensure clean, reliable datasets.
Delivered geospatial insights for public health planning and monitoring.

experience.title: Data Analyst
highlights: Performed data cleaning, visualization, and trend analysis using Python and R.
Delivered actionable insights that influenced business decisions.
Built SQL queries and automated reports to reduce manual analysis time.

projects.title: NMCP Map Portal (NMEP)
projects.description: Village-level visualization and program monitoring for the National Malaria Elimination Programme.

projects.title: Developed NMEP data collection forms and workflows to capture community and field data for malaria surveillance.
projects.description: Data Visualization Dashboard Interactive dashboard for analysis and visualization using ReactJS, D3.js, and Chart.js.

projects.title: Machine Learning Models
projects.description: Collection of classification, regression, and clustering models with deployment examples.
